name: Grilled Tofu with Summer Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 Red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 Green bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 large White onion, cut into 1-inch pieces
12 Bamboo skewers, soaked in water for 1 hour
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tofu and teriyaki sauce in a sealed plastic bag. Freeze overnight and thaw the next day. Turn the bag once or twice during the thawing process. Reserve the marinade.
2. Place tofu, peppers, onion, and mushrooms on skewers, alternating the order, beginning and ending with tofu. Mix the oil with the reserved marinade and brush it on the tofu and vegetables. Place on a grill and brown on all sides. Brush with BBQ sauce and grill for a while longer.
